message: Meryl said she can keep going just knowing her daughter is alive.
After all, no matter what it was like before, now she seems happy to have family.
I feel like she's become a bit gentler; was it because of her plain outfit?
If Meryl wasn't at the hotel, she might have gone on location.
Meryl hasn't told her that her daughter is Cindy yet. I'm curious about her reaction after telling her, but it's okay to keep it a secret until they meet.
I wonder where Kristy has gone?
If she's out on counseling, there's no need to worry, but if she's walking around in that state...
I want to believe it was just a temporary thing, but I still worry about the past.
Is Kristy okay?
The other day, I really thought she had lost her mind.
Günter said there might be something about Kristy's past, but could there really be something like that?
I'm worried, so I want to go check on her, but on the other hand, I'm also scared to meet her.
It's one week until Tim's audition. I wonder if she'll finally think about it after that's over.
I wonder if Meryl can hold on for a week.
Cindy looked very happy when she was with Tim.
She's still 16. Being in such a sensitive age, this incident seems to have had a strong impact on her.
She seemed quite confused by the sudden appearance of her biological parent.
Since Meryl is urging me, I need to meet Cindy and make plans to see Meryl.
I hope she’s at home.
Günter is too busy to meet.
It’s true that I’m the one getting in the way, so I can’t complain.
I wanted to ask if there was anything I could do to help Kristy.
I’ll check with Günter to see if there's anything I can do for Kristy's recovery. I want to support her as a friend.
I hope it's one of Günter's good days.
The last time I saw Gabriela, she looked really exhausted. I hope her absence this time is for a fun reason, like a trip.
I wonder how Gabriela is doing? Although, there's not much to talk about now that there's no progress with Ginny.
Tim has an audition in a week. If he passes and becomes a pro, I wonder what Cindy will do?
If Tim debuts as a professional, there might be some misunderstandings between the two.
That's not something I should worry about.
Tim has this brotherly or almost fatherly vibe toward Cindy.
I remember that.
They've probably been relating to each other like that till now.
It was a bit unexpected.
I feel like I want to sit down and have a slow talk with Tim.
He seemed to have forgotten that I went to see him. He must have been high back then.
Still, I was surprised he casually agreed to meet. I hope there's nothing behind that.
I’m supposed to meet Tony at 5:30 this evening.
In front of the Kasbah.
That’s the plan.
I wonder if Tony is just playing hard to get.
Could he really be out?
Is he planning to keep this up?
Could it be that he's really holding Ginny captive in that house?
I want to meet with Tony when he’s sane and hear what he has to say.
I wonder if he’s at home today?
Ginny might be imprisoned in Tony's apartment.
But would Tony really go so far as to sever her hands?
If by any chance it was a lovers' quarrel, wouldn't it be unlikely for someone to cut the hand of a woman he likes?
He might be long dead, poor Ginny.
Eva always shows up suddenly, leaving behind words that get under your skin.
She's probably the type that likes to surprise people.
She said as if she knew who the serial murder case perpetrator was, but it might have been a huge misunderstanding.
Next time we meet, will she make a surprising entrance again?
Of course, it was a relief that Meryl was on location for the shoot.
When we met at the Rain Tree, there was none of that familiarity, and I felt like there was a subtle tension in the air, was that just my imagination?
I was worried about Cindy, but maybe I should tell her the truth.
Still, I was surprised; who would’ve thought I’d run into Jennifer at the Rain Tree?
She said she heard the location from Yuriko at the party, but her demeanor seemed a bit suggestive.
Maybe, just maybe, Jennifer likes me.
But that’s impossible, right?
What on earth did she come to that place for?
It definitely didn't seem like she was just killing time.
